2603.23447.title: 3DCity-LLM: Empowering Multi-modality Large Language Models for 3D City-scale Perception and Understanding
2603.23447.paper_summary: While multi-modality large language models excel in object-centric or indoor scenarios, scaling them to 3D city-scale environments remains a formidable challenge. To bridge this gap, we propose 3DCity-LLM, a unified framework designed for 3D city-scale vision-language perception and understanding. 3DCity-LLM employs a coarse-to-fine feature encoding strategy comprising three parallel branches for target object, inter-object relationship, and global scene. To facilitate large-scale training, we introduce 3DCity-LLM-1.2M dataset that comprises approximately 1.2 million high-quality samples across seven representative task categories, ranging from fine-grained object analysis to multi-faceted scene planning. This strictly quality-controlled dataset integrates explicit 3D numerical information and diverse user-oriented simulations, enriching the question-answering diversity and realism of urban scenarios. Furthermore, we apply a multi-dimensional protocol based on text-similarity metrics and LLM-based semantic assessment to ensure faithful and comprehensive evaluations for all methods. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks demonstrate that 3DCity-LLM significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, offering a promising and meaningful direction for advancing spatial reasoning and urban intelligence. The source code and dataset are available at https://github.com/SYSU-3DSTAILab/3D-City-LLM.
2603.23447.paper_summary_zh: 雖然多模態大型語言模型在以物體為中心或室內場景中表現出色，但將它們擴展到3D城市規模環境仍然是一項艱巨的挑戰。為了彌補這一差距，我們提出了3DCity-LLM，一個旨在實現3D城市規模視覺-語言感知和理解的統一框架。3DCity-LLM採用粗到細的特徵編碼策略，包括三個平行分支，分別針對目標物體、物體間關係和全局場景。為了促進大規模訓練，我們引入了3DCity-LLM-1.2M數據集，該數據集包含約120萬個高質量樣本，涵蓋七個代表性任務類別，從細粒度物體分析到多面向場景規劃。這個嚴格質量控制的數據集整合了明確的3D數值信息和多樣的用戶導向模擬，豐富了城市場景的問答多樣性和真實性。此外，我們應用基於文本相似度度量和基於LLM的語義評估的多維協議，以確保對所有方法進行真實和全面的評估。在兩個基準上的廣泛實驗表明，3DCity-LLM顯著超越了現有的最先進方法，為推進空間推理和城市智能提供了一個有前景且有意義的方向。源代碼和數據集可在 https://github.com/SYSU-3DSTAILab/3D-City-LLM 獲得。
2603.23447.author: Yiping Chen et.al.
2603.23447.authors: Yiping Chen, Jinpeng Li, Wenyu Ke, Yang Luo, Jie Ouyang, Zhongjie He, Li Liu, Hongchao Fan, Hao Wu
